name: Canvas Medical
description: Canvas Medical — HIPAA-compliant EHR API platform with Python-based customization for building clinical workflows.

seo.title: Canvas Medical — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Canvas Medical: Canvas Medical — HIPAA-compliant EHR API platform with Python-based customization for building clinical workflows.

when_to_use: HIPAA-compliant EHR workflow automation for telehealth
Clinical data API integration for health app developers
Custom care protocol logic via Python plugin SDK
Patient onboarding automation with BAA-covered infrastructure
FHIR-compatible data export for patient engagement apps

pros: Python SDK lets engineers script clinical workflows
HIPAA compliance and BAA handled at the platform level
FHIR-native API avoids HL7 v2 pain
Extensible plugins compete with monolithic legacy EHRs
cons: Niche platform — smaller talent pool than Epic/Cerner
Targets direct-care practices, not hospitals or large networks
Pricing opaque until a sales conversation
review.verdict: A refreshing developer-first EHR for digital-health startups, but not yet a serious hospital-scale alternative.
review.best_for: Tech-forward direct care, telehealth, or specialty clinics with engineers
review.not_for: Hospital systems needing enterprise EHR breadth and integrations

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence

lock_in.reason: Proprietary EHR platform with custom integration

developer_experience.reason: Python SDK and FHIR API docs
